description:
This quiz evaluates intermediate to advanced JavaScript proficiency by testing developers' understanding of the notoriously complex native Date API, including formatting and localization. It adopts a playful yet practical teaching tone, encouraging learners to master built-in methods and reduce unnecessary reliance on third-party libraries. The multiple-choice format provides an accessible way to reinforce core language concepts.
Topics: JavaScript Date API, Date formatting, Localization, Native vs. third-party libraries, Core JavaScript skills
Audience: JavaScript developers and frontend engineers
